task_description: Phase 22: Create the QuantMeet app (Zoom/Google Meet killer) with Fastify+WebSocket backend, 7 services (room, SFU, recording, transcript, summary, action-items, breakout), routes, frontend type definitions, and comprehensive test suites.

verification.summary: All 102 tests pass across 7 test files. TypeScript compiles with only pre-existing TS6305 reference warnings (same as all other apps in the monorepo). Tests exercise real service logic with proper error/edge case coverage.
